title: doryopteris robusta
intro: Doryopteris robusta, also known as the False Stagshorn, is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Doryopteris robusta include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an antidote for snake bites. Herbal preparations of Doryopteris robusta include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are made by drying the leaves and stems, then extracting the active compounds.
